metadata.title: Wiger AI — ERP + CRM for Manufacturing & Distribution
metadata.description: Unified management platform for manufacturers and distributors. Inventory control, sales, production, and customer management in one system designed for industry.
metadata.twitterTitle: Wiger AI — ERP + CRM for Manufacturing & Construction

hero.subtext: In a world that never stops moving forward, with a revolution that will change the way we know the world, we couldn't afford to stand still…

services.heading: While the world is forever moving forward,
services.subheading: can you afford to stand still?

erp.title: Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)
erp.description: Total control of your production operations
erp.detailedDescription: Manage inventories, production orders, supply chain, and costs in real time. A system designed for the reality of manufacturing: integrated, agile, and adaptable to your process.

crm.title: Industrial CRM
crm.detailedDescription: Manage clients, distributors, and prospects with full pipeline visibility. Quotes, order tracking, and portfolio analysis, all connected to your ERP for faster decisions.

tms.title: Transportation Management System (TMS)
tms.description: Best-price quotes without going carrier by carrier
tms.detailedDescription: An integrated system customized to your processes for shipping any goods from your company. Choose the carrier and quote that suits you best and save hours of manual processes managing shipments.

capabilities.heading: Your current processes optimized
capabilities.subtitle: Every module was designed with the reality of Mexican manufacturers and distributors in mind. No generic templates.

metrics.heading: The only thing you and your employees need
metrics.subtitle: Wiger products adapt so well to your processes that neither you nor your employees will need more than a week to adapt.

about.title: About Us — Wiger AI
about.description: Meet the team behind Wiger AI: our mission, vision, and the values that guide every project we build.
about.heading: We build the software that
about.subtitle: We are a team of engineers and business strategists focused on one problem: enabling manufacturing and distribution companies in Mexico to operate with the efficiency of large corporations.
about.missionText: We develop fully customized ERP, CRM, and automation systems for companies that produce, distribute, and move things in the physical world. We want every industrial SME to have access to the technology that was previously only available to multinationals.
about.visionTitle: The operations platform for Latin American industry
about.visionText: In five years, we want to be the reference operating system for manufacturing and distribution companies in Latin America — the place where every order, inventory item, customer, and process lives and is managed intelligently.
about.value1Description: Every line of code exists to solve a real manufacturing or distribution problem. We don't build features, we build results.
about.value2Description: We implement in weeks, not months. But never at the expense of the stability or security of the system our clients operate every day.
about.value3Description: No fine print, no surprises. Our clients know exactly what we build, why, and what results to expect.
about.value4Description: The software we deliver on day one is the starting point, not the destination. We iterate with each client until the system is exactly what they need.
about.ctaText: In less than a week, we'll show you exactly how Wiger AI can transform your company.

sercodam.title: Sercodam | Case Study — Wiger AI
sercodam.description: How Wiger AI implemented a custom ERP for Sercodam Redes y Piolas, saving them 1 full day per week.
sercodam.subtitle: Manufacturer and distributor of sports, construction, and industrial nets with operations across Mexico.
sercodam.challengeText1: Sercodam managed its inventory of hundreds of net references — sports, construction, and industrial — in multiple Google Sheets shared among different employees. Every update was manual, error-prone, and depended on the right person having access to the right file at the right time.
sercodam.challengeText2: The team spent hours each week consolidating data, reconciling differences between sheets, and generating reports by hand. Business growth threatened to make that system unsustainable.
sercodam.solutionText1: Wiger designed and implemented a fully customized ERP for Sercodam, adapted to their product catalog, order flows, and warehouse structure. The system centralizes inventory in real time, automates report generation, and eliminates the need for manual spreadsheet updates.
sercodam.solutionText2: Implementation was completed in under four weeks, with training included for the entire team. Today, Sercodam operates with full inventory visibility and has recovered the equivalent of one full working day per week.
sercodam.ctaTitle: Your operations can also be transformed
sercodam.ctaText: Tell us how you work today and in less than a week we'll show you exactly how Wiger AI can help.
